name: Meringue or Air Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar in a large mixing bowl until foamy.
2. Add sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, and beat at the highest speed until stiff and glossy. Do not underbeat. Remove 3/4 cup meringue to a small mixing bowl; set aside.
3. Stir cocoa into the meringue in a large mixing bowl until thoroughly combined. Drop cocoa-flavored meringue by level tablespoon, about 1 1/2 inches apart, onto aluminum foil-lined baking sheets. Make a small indentation in the center of each with the top of a teaspoon.
4. Spoon 1/2 teaspoon reserved plain meringue into each indentation. Bake at 275°F for 25 minutes. Turn off the oven; leave the meringues in the oven with the door closed for 1 hour. Remove from the oven and cool completely. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
- Calories: 18.6
- Fat: 0.1 g
- Percent of calories from fat: 2.7%
